<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\Translation\Provider; use Symfony\Component\Translation\Exception\InvalidArgumentException; /** * @author Mathieu Santostefano <msantostefano@protonmail.com> */ final class TranslationProviderCollection { /** * @var array<string, ProviderInterface> */ private array $providers; /** * @param array<string, ProviderInterface> $providers */ public function __construct(iterable $providers) { $this->providers = \is_array($providers) ? $providers : iterator_to_array($providers); } public function __toString(): string { return '['.implode(',', array_keys($this->providers)).']'; } public function has(string $name): bool { return isset($this->providers[$name]); } public function get(string $name): ProviderInterface { if (!$this->has($name)) { throw new InvalidArgumentException(\sprintf('Provider "%s" not found. Available: "%s".', $name, (string) $this)); } return $this->providers[$name]; } public function keys(): array { return array_keys($this->providers); } }
